name: Eggplant Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 1 small eggplant, unpeeled, cut into 1/2 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Place eggplant slices on an ungreased cookie sheet and bake for 20 minutes or until soft.
3. In a saucepan, combine the remaining ingredients except cheeses. Simmer for 20 minutes.
4. Assemble layers in a square baking dish: half of the eggplant, half of the sauce, and half of the cheeses. Ensure there are two full layers in the dish.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes.
